description: User asks for current weather in a clearly named city; the single weather tool should be called with that city.
user: What's the weather like in Tokyo right now?

tools.name: get_current_weather
tools.description: Get the current weather conditions for a given city.

city.description: The name of the city to get weather for.

description: User wants a timer set for a stated number of minutes; the set_timer tool should be called with the duration.
user: Set a timer for 10 minutes.

tools.name: set_timer
tools.description: Start a countdown timer for a given duration.

duration_minutes.description: Length of the timer in minutes.

description: User asks for the current stock price of a company by ticker symbol; the price tool should be called with that symbol.
user: What's the current stock price of AAPL?

tools.name: get_stock_price
tools.description: Look up the latest stock price for a ticker symbol.

symbol.description: The stock ticker symbol, e.g. AAPL.

description: User asks to search the web for a clearly stated query; the search tool should be called with that query string.
user: Search the web for the best espresso machines under $500.

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Run a web search and return relevant results.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return.

description: User states an amount and two currencies to convert between; the converter tool should be called with the amount and both currency codes.
user: Convert 100 USD to EUR.

tools.name: convert_currency
tools.description: Convert a monetary amount from one currency to another.

amount.description: The amount of money to convert.

from_currency.description: The source currency code, e.g. USD.

to_currency.description: The target currency code, e.g. EUR.

description: User asks a general knowledge question about history; the only available tool (weather) is irrelevant, so the model should answer in plain text without calling it.
user: Who painted the Mona Lisa?

tools.name: get_current_weather
tools.description: Get the current weather conditions for a given city.

city.description: The name of the city to get weather for.

description: User says it's urgent and the production site is down, mapping the priority enum to 'high'.
user: Open a support ticket titled 'Checkout page is down' and mark it as high priority since it's affecting all customers.

tools.name: create_support_ticket
tools.description: Create a new support ticket with a title and priority level.

title.description: The title of the support ticket.

priority.description: The priority level of the ticket.

description: Tests fidelity of an absolute file path argument with directories and extension preserved exactly.
user: Create a new empty file at /home/dana/projects/web-app/src/components/Header.tsx for me.

tools.name: create_file
tools.description: Create a new empty file at the given filesystem path.

path.description: Absolute filesystem path of the file to create.

description: Tests fidelity of a URL with query string and a multi-word title containing punctuation.
user: Bookmark the page https://news.example.com/articles?id=42&ref=home with the title "Breaking: Q3 Earnings, Explained".

tools.name: add_bookmark
tools.description: Save a bookmark with a URL and a display title.

description: Tests that an exact quoted multi-word search phrase with an apostrophe is passed verbatim.
user: Search the docs for the exact phrase "can't connect to the database server".

tools.name: search_docs
tools.description: Search documentation for a query string.

args.query: can't connect to the database server

description: Tests fidelity of a multi-word commit message containing a colon and parentheses.
user: Commit my staged changes with the message: fix(auth): handle expired tokens on refresh

tools.name: git_commit
tools.description: Create a git commit from staged changes with the given message.

args.message: fix(auth): handle expired tokens on refresh

description: Tools deal with file zipping and URL shortening, both irrelevant to a general knowledge question, so no tool should be called.
user: What's the difference between TCP and UDP at a high level?

tools.name: zip_directory
tools.description: Compress a directory into a zip archive.

directory_path.description: Absolute path of the directory to compress.

tools.name: shorten_url
tools.description: Create a shortened alias for a long URL.

description: User explicitly requests Fahrenheit, mapping to the unit enum value 'fahrenheit' and the city to 'Boston'.
user: What's the current temperature in Boston in Fahrenheit?

tools.name: get_current_weather
tools.description: Get the current weather for a given city in the requested temperature unit.

city.description: The city to get the weather for.

description: User asks for business class, mapping the cabin_class enum to 'business' with origin and destination.
user: Find me flights from Chicago to Tokyo in business class.

tools.name: search_flights
tools.description: Search for flights between two cities in a given cabin class.

description: User asks to mute the living room speaker, mapping the action enum to 'mute' for the named device.
user: Mute the living room speaker.

tools.name: control_speaker
tools.description: Control a smart speaker by performing a volume action.

device.description: The name of the speaker device.

description: User converts US dollars to euros, mapping from_currency to 'USD' and to_currency enum to 'EUR' with the amount.
user: Convert 250 US dollars to euros.

tools.name: convert_currency
tools.description: Convert an amount from one currency to another.

amount.description: The amount of money to convert.

description: The only available tool sets a thermostat mode; the user asks for a haiku, which is unrelated, so no tool should be called.
user: Can you write me a short haiku about autumn leaves?

tools.name: set_thermostat_mode
tools.description: Set the operating mode of the home thermostat.

description: User specifies an exact integer temperature; expected arg must be the number 68, not a string
user: Set the living room thermostat to 68 degrees.

tools.name: set_thermostat
tools.description: Set the target temperature for a room's thermostat.

description: User gives a decimal currency amount; expected arg must be the float 250.75 with the correct currency enum
user: Transfer 250.75 USD from my checking account to my savings account.

tools.name: transfer_funds
tools.description: Transfer money between two accounts.

description: User specifies a TCP port and protocol; port must be integer 8080 and protocol the enum value
user: Open port 8080 for TCP traffic on the web server.

tools.name: open_firewall_port
tools.description: Open a network port in the firewall.

description: User gives a percentage and product count; percentage must be number 15 and quantity integer 3
user: Apply a 15 percent discount to 3 units of the order.

tools.name: apply_discount
tools.description: Apply a percentage discount to a number of order line items.

quantity.description: Number of units the discount applies to
